method: to add a nice green salad to round it off
I think a nice slice of pie is such a treat and this one is
a great British classic. It's comforting, damn tasty, and
also cheap to make. There's great satisfaction in making
lovely meat pie, and I can promise you that everyone
at your table will be coming back for more. ,.
